title: Preserve a cache-refresh rollback after a stale result
goal: Refresh the report cache without serving stale totals to the dashboard.
interruption_point: The run stopped after a stale-cache patch and a safer follow-up plan.

events.text: Goal: Refresh the report cache without serving stale totals to the dashboard.
Plan: Inspect the cache invalidation path, patch the refresh trigger, rerun the dashboard smoke test, and keep the old response shape.
Constraint: Do not change the dashboard response schema because the analytics client still depends on it.
Source: tests/test_dashboard_cache.py::test_refresh_after_import failed with stale totals after import.
Attempt: Added a local cache bypass in the view layer. The result stayed stale.
Decision: Keep the view layer untouched and refresh the shared cache entry instead.
Lesson: The stale response comes from the shared cache key, not the dashboard serializer.
Next step: Patch the shared cache invalidation path and rerun the smoke test.
